query: This design came from a UI generator. Validate it with UXLoom and fix every finding it reports.
expected_behavior: Runs validation before making changes and surfaces the gap list
Resolves the unreachable state by wiring a transition to it or removing it, not by ignoring it
Designs or contracts the missing empty/loading/error states rather than deleting them from requiredStates
Final project validates with zero errors and zero unexplained warnings
